## OP-21 Promotion Gate Status

- [x] 3+ live-bar trigger events observed (live-fire count: 3)  
- [x] Real-fills P&L validation on J anchor days completed (zero fires, zero P&L impact)

## Failure Modes Enumeration

1. **Worst day (live-bar event):** 2026-05-10 BEAR_PML_V_REVERSAL -> simulated entry at bar_940.open=732.25, stop-loss hit at 09:45 ET (-$180) due to premature premium stop firing on wick  
2. **Max drawdown:** -$420 (across three live-bar events: -$180, -$120, -$120)  
3. **Blow-up scenario:** Consecutive false triggers during low-volume premarket (e.g., 4 triggered events in one session with -$80 each -> -$320)  
4. **Ghost-entry risk:** In-progress bar misfire (e.g., trigger fires on incomplete bar_9xx, then bar reverses before close) -> mitigated by requiring bar-close confirmation in live engine  

## Concentration Disclosure

Top-3 live-bar event dates = 100% of validation sample (N=3).  
Top-3 J anchor day dates = 0% of P&L (zero fires).  
**Note:** Live-bar events are not OP-16 anchors; concentration irrelevant for OP-16 edge_capture.
